'''Olev Madak''' was a [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]] who worked at [[Darknon Station]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He [[Darknon Station Repair Bay|repaired]] [[Starship/Legends|starships]] and indifferently maintained the [[Space station/Legends|space station]]. Madak had been pursued by a group of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] for unpaid [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] debts, and upon arriving at Darknon Station, his ship was demolished. Therefore, he remained on the station. Madak bore a remarkable resemblance to the Duros businessman [[Unidentified Galladinium president|Galladinium]].

==Behind the scenes==
Olev Madak's illustration was mirrored to represent Galladinium in ''[[Galladinium's Fantastic Technology]]''.
